'''ngashudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecil|cecil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecil|cecil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngashudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæshidith|ngæshidith]] || [[word:ngæshidij|ngæshidij]] || [[word:ngæshidish|ngæshidish]] || [[word:ngæshidi|ngæshidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngashushuduth|ngashushuduth]] || [[word:ngashushuduj|ngashushuduj]] || [[word:ngashushudush|ngashushudush]] || [[word:ngashushudu|ngashushudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngashuduth|ngashuduth]] || [[word:ngashuduj|ngashuduj]] || [[word:ngashudush|ngashudush]] || [[word:ngashudu|ngashudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngashufduth|ngashufduth]] || [[word:ngashufduj|ngashufduj]] || [[word:ngashufdush|ngashufdush]] || [[word:ngashufduf|ngashufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngashuduthu|ngashuduthu]] || [[word:ngashuduju|ngashuduju]] || [[word:ngashudushu|ngashudushu]] || [[word:ngashuduku|ngashuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngashuduth|ngashuduth]] || [[word:ngashuduj|ngashuduj]] || [[word:ngashudush|ngashudush]] || [[word:ngashudu|ngashudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngashuduthul|ngashuduthul]] || [[word:ngashudujul|ngashudujul]] || [[word:ngashudushul|ngashudushul]] || [[word:ngashudukul|ngashudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngashuduthuthu|ngashuduthuthu]] || [[word:ngashudujuju|ngashudujuju]] || [[word:ngashudushushu|ngashudushushu]] || [[word:ngashuduku|ngashuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngashuduthun|ngashuduthun]] || [[word:ngashudujun|ngashudujun]] || [[word:ngashudushun|ngashudushun]] || [[word:ngashudukun|ngashudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngashuduthuoro|ngashuduthuoro]] || [[word:ngashudujuoro|ngashudujuoro]] || [[word:ngashudushuoro|ngashudushuoro]] || [[word:ngashudukuoro|ngashudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
